story: As a shopper, I want to add products to my cart, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and remove items, so that I can manage what I want to purchase.

cases.title: Add a product to the cart and verify cart badge update
steps: Start on the homepage
Click the '+ Add' button on the first product card
Verify the button text changes to '✓ Added'
Verify the cart badge displays '1'
assertions: The product is added to the cart
The cart badge updates to show '1'

cases.title: Open cart drawer and view cart items
steps: Start on the homepage with one item in the cart
Click the cart pill in the navigation bar
Verify the cart drawer is visible
Verify the cart drawer lists the added product with name, price, and quantity

cases.title: Increase item quantity in the cart
steps: Start on the homepage with one item in the cart
Click the cart pill to open the cart drawer
Click the '+' button next to the product in the cart
Verify the product quantity increases by 1
Verify the cart subtotal updates accordingly

cases.title: Decrease item quantity in the cart
steps: Start on the homepage with one item in the cart
Click the cart pill to open the cart drawer
Click the '-' button next to the product in the cart
Verify the product quantity decreases by 1
Verify the cart subtotal updates accordingly

cases.title: Remove an item from the cart
steps: Start on the homepage with one item in the cart
Click the cart pill to open the cart drawer
Click the delete button next to the product in the cart
Verify the product is removed from the cart
Verify the cart badge displays '0'
assertions: Product is removed from the cart

cases.title: Verify empty cart state
steps: Start on the homepage with an empty cart
Click the cart pill to open the cart drawer
Verify the cart drawer displays an 'empty cart' message
Verify the 'Proceed to Checkout' button is disabled

cases.title: Proceed to checkout with items in the cart
steps: Start on the homepage with one item in the cart
Click the cart pill to open the cart drawer
Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button
Verify the URL includes 'checkout.html'
